hero.title: Join Our <1>Academic Partner Network</1>
hero.subtitle: Are you a university or educational institution looking to attract international students? We help you reach thousands of students worldwide.

claim.title: Your University Is Already Listed
claim.subtitle: Over 36,000 institutions are already listed. Search for yours and claim your academic profile — control your data, connect with students, and boost your digital presence.
claim.placeholder: Type your university or institution name...
claim.noResults: We couldn't find your institution in our database

postVerification.title: What Do You Get After Verification?
postVerification.subtitle: Once verified as an official representative, you unlock professional tools to manage your institution's presence and receive qualified student applications

feature1.title: Control Your Institution's Data
feature1.desc: After verifying your identity as an official representative, you get full permissions to correct inaccurate data and manage your institution's section on the platform.
feature1.f1: Edit tuition fees, programs, and contact information
feature1.f2: Update photos, videos, and promotional content
feature1.f3: Monitor and improve your institution's search visibility

feature2.title: Direct International Admissions Channel
feature2.desc: Direct connection to your international admissions department. Our AI system filters and ranks applications by admission criteria match, delivering review-ready applications.
feature2.f1: Smart filtering by GPA, language level, and major
feature2.f3: Instant notifications for new qualified applications

feature3.title: Partner Analytics Dashboard
feature3.desc: Detailed analytics on your institution's page performance — visits, student sources, conversion rates, and comparisons with competing institutions in your region.
feature3.f1: Monthly reports on visits, engagement, and conversions
feature3.f2: Geographic analysis of interested student sources
feature3.f3: Program performance comparison and demand insights

whyPartner.title: Why Partner With Us?
whyPartner.subtitle: We provide your institution with everything needed to attract the best international students

item1.title: Global Student Network
item1.desc: Direct access to thousands of international students from 215+ countries seeking study opportunities

item2.title: Full Enrollment Support
item2.desc: Dedicated team assisting with complete student admission and enrollment processes

item3.title: Advanced Digital Marketing
item3.desc: AI-powered targeted marketing campaigns to attract the right students for your programs

item4.title: Trusted Tech Platform
item4.desc: Integrated digital platform for managing applications and communicating with students transparently

type1.title: Academic Partnership
type1.desc: Collaboration agreements with universities to attract international students and streamline admissions

type2.title: Institutional Partnership
type2.desc: Partnerships with language institutes, training centers, and accredited educational institutions

type3.title: Service Partnership
type3.desc: Collaboration with housing, insurance, and transport providers to serve students

howItWorks.title: Verification & Launch Path
howItWorks.subtitle: Four steps from request to receiving your first qualified student application

step1.title: Search & Claim
step1.desc: Find your university in our database and submit a profile management request

step2.title: Identity Verification
step2.desc: We verify your identity through your institution's official email or documents

step3.title: Partner Dashboard
step3.desc: Get editing permissions and track your institution's page performance

step4.title: Receive Filtered Applications
step4.desc: Start receiving AI-filtered and ranked student applications ready for review

metrics.title: Numbers That Speak
metrics.subtitle: Real results we've achieved with our academic partners

q1.a: We offer flexible performance-based partnership models. No upfront fees — you only pay when actual results are achieved.

q2.a: We cover 215+ countries with a special focus on the Middle East, North Africa, and Central Asia.

q3.q: How long does it take to start?
q3.a: Partnership setup typically takes 2-4 weeks from the first meeting to starting student recruitment.

q4.q: Do you support smaller institutions too?
q4.a: Yes! We work with institutions of all sizes — from language institutes to major universities.

cta.title: Start Your Partnership Today
cta.subtitle: Get in touch and we'll help you design a partnership that fits your institution and goals.
